name: Invoice processor and extractor with AI
description: Fetches invoice emails from Gmail, Claude AI extracts structured data including amounts, dates, vendors, invoice numbers, and line items, then saves all extracted invoice data to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's OCR AI invoice processor and validator workflow.

source.originalName: Invoice processor & validator with OCR, AI & Google Sheets

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for fetching invoice emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving extracted data

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save invoice data

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for invoice data

searchQuery.default: subject:(invoice OR receipt OR payment OR billing) newer_than:7d
searchQuery.description: Gmail search query for finding invoice emails

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process (default: 15)

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.fetchInvoiceEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 15) };

steps.name: Compile email metadata for AI extraction
Build Claude prompt for invoice extraction
Build Google Sheets rows from extracted invoices
Save invoice data to Google Sheets
